# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

# Upstream Services
upstreams:
  - name: ms1
    url: http://localhost:8000
    connect_timeout: 60000 # 1 minute
    write_timeout: 60000 # 1 minute
    read_timeout: 60000 # 1 minute

  - name: ms2
    url: http://localhost:8001
    connect_timeout: 60000 # 1 minute
    write_timeout: 60000 # 1 minute
    read_timeout: 60000 # 1 minute

# Routes
routes:
  - name: route-1
    paths: /api/v1/*
    strip_path: false
    preserve_host: true
    hosts:
      - ms1

  - name: route-2
    paths: /api/v2/*
    strip_path: false
    preserve_host: true
    hosts:
      - ms2

# Plugins
plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 100 # Maximum number of requests allowed per minute
      monthly: 5000 # Maximum number of requests allowed per month
